title: Premium Agreement Overview
snippet: Premium agreements include priority support, enhanced SLAs, and optional commercial add-ons. Exact negotiated pricing terms are available only in customer-specific agreements.

title: General Liability Policy Summary
snippet: The standard agreement includes general liability limitations and service credits for qualifying incidents. Specific caps and carve-outs vary by signed customer contract.

title: Support Tiers Overview
snippet: Support is offered in Standard, Advanced, and Premium tiers. Premium provides 24x7 response and named escalation management.

title: Pricing FAQ
snippet: Pricing is determined by workload profile, committed volume, and contract duration. Public pages intentionally omit confidential discount schedules.
